title: Läufer 59075 Rondella X-Band, Elastic Cross Bands, Rubber Bands 150 x 11 mm, Diameter 100 mm, 30 g Tub, Multi-Coloured
description: From the manufacturer Runner Rondella X-Band Elastic packaging tapes for quick and beautiful packaging. Läufer Rondella X-Band Flexible Cross Bands The super strong colourful X-shape rubber bands are true packaging artists. Thanks to the special construction, square, round and oval objects can be safely held together. The extremely tear-resistant cross rubber bands are suitable for transporting, bundling or storing CDs, letters, DVDs, booklets, magazines, game collections, file folders and much more. With the clever design and bright colours, the flexible packaging cross bands leave a lasting impression even when wrapping gifts. The Rondella X-bands runners are assorted colours in 5 different sizes. They are available in packaging with 30 g, 100 g or 500 g contents. Also available: Läufer 69582 Rondella X-Band Assorted Sizes 80 x 11, 100 x 11, 130 x 11 and 150 x 11 mm. 80 x 11 mm. 100 x 11 mm. 130 x 11 mm. 150 x 11 mm. 250 x 25 mm. Assorted colours. Assorted colours. Assorted colours. 30 g tin. ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ no data 100 g box. ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ no data 500 g box. ✓ no data no data ✓ ✓ Rubber bands made of natural rubber. Since 1922, runners Rondella rubber rings and rubber bands have been indispensable helpers in sorting, bundling, filing and organising. The branded rubber rings impress with their consistently excellent quality and durability. The Rondella X-bands runners and rubber bands are made from natural rubber. Rubber is extracted from the milk juice (latex) of the rubber tree. Vulcanisation and further processes turns the raw material into an elastic, flexible cruciate ligament. Which rubber ring do you need? To find the right runner Rondella X-band, you will receive an explanation of the dimensions: Length (flat dimensions): The elastic band is laid flat on top of each other when unstretched and the longest side is measured. Width (cutting width): the width is measured on the short side at the centre of the X-shape. Diameter: the inner dimension of the circular rubber band. Quick and easy to pack. Pack up and unpack with the colourful runners Rondella cross bands are fast, easy and fun. Due to the high quality of the rubber bands, they are particularly frequently reusable. The right storage Runner Rondella rubber rings and rubber bands are known for their excellent resilience and durability. In direct sunlight, however, our Rondella rubber rings can become brittle over time. Store these natural rubber products in the packaging best protected from light.
